subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! All praise be unto Thee for having made Thyself known unto me and caused me to acknowledge Thy oneness and confess it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی لک الحمد بما عرفتنی نفسک و جعلتنی مقرا بوحدانیتک و معترفا
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God
